title: Mission Prompt
description: Generates an evocative opening situation for a mission.
entries: A distress signal loops from a place that should be empty.
The people who hired you are lying about the reason.
Everyone who took this job before you has vanished.
A stranger offers too much for too little work.
Something was stolen that no one will admit existed.
The map ends at a door that isn't on it.
A name you buried long ago is being spoken again.
The last messenger arrived with the wrong hands.
A debt comes due, and it was never yours to pay.
The quiet in this place is the wrong kind of quiet.
Someone left a warning meant only for you.
The one you were sent to find is already dead.
A locked room holds the answer and the danger both.
The town remembers a night no one will describe.
You are the only one who noticed the pattern.
A promise made in your name is coming to collect.
The trail leads exactly where you were told not to go.
An old enemy asks for your help, and means it.
The reward is real, but so is the catch beneath it.
Something follows the shipment, and it isn't cargo.
The witness will only speak to someone they trust.
A face in the crowd knows far more than it should.
The job is simple, which is the first warning.
Nightfall changes the rules, and it's nearly dark.
